description: Lightweight financing archetypes for technology selection context. Not a full financing module — just enough to inform tech feasibility.

archetypes.name: Municipal Budget / Public Investment
archetypes.description: City funds from general budget or earmarked climate funds

archetypes.name: DFI Concessional Loan
archetypes.description: Below-market-rate loans from development finance institutions (IDB, World Bank, BNDES)

archetypes.name: Public-Private Partnership (Light)
archetypes.description: Simplified PPP structure — city provides land/permits, private sector builds/operates

archetypes.name: Climate Fund Grant
archetypes.description: Non-repayable grants from GCF, GEF, bilateral climate funds

archetypes.name: Green / Sustainability Bond
archetypes.description: Debt instrument with proceeds earmarked for climate/green projects
